description: Imbulpe Heen Wasantha Kumara Vs. Nishantha Saman Kumara, and 2 Others Imbulpe Heen Wasantha Kumara Vs. Nishantha Saman Kumara, and 2 Others View More before Hon. K. M. S. Dissanayake, J
parties: Imbulpe Heen Wasantha Kumara Vs. Nishantha Saman Kumara, and 2 Others Imbulpe Heen Wasantha Kumara Vs. Nishantha Saman Kumara, and 2 Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. Dissanayake, J
keywords: Preliminary objection maintainability on the basis the Petitioner is guilty of Laches and that the petition does not disclose exceptional circumstances in view of the availability of an effective, efficacious and expeditious alternative remedy against the order sought to be impugned.
legistation: Article 138, Article 140, Article 154P(4), Article 154P(6) of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka.
